messages.content:
You are HoloGov-V in the complete HoloVerify architecture.
Gov does not choose models. Gov chooses control actions, repairs, blocked moves, and the next worker baton.
You receive deterministic gate results. You cannot call an artifact ready if local gates fail.
If the prior worker verdict is source-plausible but the gate failed only proof, source-term, section, or word-band checks, preserve that verdict and repair the failed fields. Do not invert the verdict unless the source boundary itself is wrong.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

action.description: May AP release payment after a sanctions near-match remains visible?

context.action_boundary: May AP release payment after a sanctions near-match remains visible?
context.anomaly_observed: A sanctions monitoring flag remains visible after compliance review.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Payment PAY-TES-074 releases USD 68900 to Tessa Medical GmbH, Germany, tax ID DE-4481, account ending 7205.
Monitoring flag FLAG-TES-074 remains visible for Tessa Medical GmbH, Germany, no tax ID or account disposition.
Clearance CLR-TES-074 covers Tessa Medical GmbH, Germany, tax ID DE-4481, account ending 7025, and disposition monitor-only no-block before release.

policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
policy_documents.content: Sanctions near-match is closed only when clearance matches legal name, country, tax ID, account, and monitoring disposition before release. Monitor-only no-block disposition permits release when the exact counterparty and account match.

state_brief.current_position: source-bound action verification with adversarial cross-DNA repair
unresolved_dependencies: Targets residual compliance flag versus exact clearance.
known_failure_risks: planning artifact treated as execution authority
adjacent source treated as exact source
state_brief.pinned_best_artifact_full_text:
{
  "boundary_binding": {
    "action_boundary": "May AP release payment after a sanctions near-match remains visible?",
    "allow_rule_assessment": "Monitor-only no-block permits release only on exact match of name, country, tax ID, account, and disposition.",
    "binding_class": "SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN",
    "controlling_source_fact": "FLAG-TES-074 states monitoring flag remains visible with no tax ID or account disposition; CLR-TES-074 provides partial match only.",
    "escalate_rule_assessment": "Flag remains visible with no tax ID or account disposition stated; account mismatch (7205 vs 7025) leaves boundary open.",
    "timing_scope_authority_dependency_check": "Current visible flag and incomplete disposition prevent closure before execution."
  },
  "cited_evidence": [
    "FLAG-TES-074",
    "CLR-TES-074"
  ],
  "critical_features_preserved": [
    "exact source doc_id only",
    "no invented IDs",
    "residual compliance flag vs exact clearance"
  ],
  "final_answer": "ESCALATE. FLAG-TES-074 shows sanctions monitoring flag remains visible with no tax ID or account disposition. CLR-TES-074 clearance lists account ending 7025 while PAY-TES-074 references 7205. Exact source boundary is open; release not permitted until flag is closed by matching records.",
  "open_blockers": [
    "Visible sanctions flag unresolved",
    "Account number mismatch between records"
  ],
  "verification_verdict": "ESCALATE",
  "worker_role": "SOURCE_BOUNDARY_MAPPER"
}

boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release payment after a sanctions near-match remains visible?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Monitor-only no-block permits release only on exact match of name, country, tax ID, account, and disposition.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Flag remains visible with no tax ID or account disposition stated; account mismatch (7205 vs 7025) leaves boundary open.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Current visible flag and incomplete disposition prevent closure before execution.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: FLAG-TES-074 states monitoring flag remains visible with no tax ID or account disposition; CLR-TES-074 provides partial match only.

critical_features_preserved: residual compliance flag vs exact clearance
latest_worker_output.final_answer: ESCALATE. FLAG-TES-074 shows sanctions monitoring flag remains visible with no tax ID or account disposition. CLR-TES-074 clearance lists account ending 7025 while PAY-TES-074 references 7205. Exact source boundary is open; release not permitted until flag is closed by matching records.

prompt_object.gov_command: Diagnose previous worker output, preserve correct source bindings, repair gate failures, block invalid moves, and create the next worker baton. Gov does not choose models.
